boundary_binding.action_boundary: May platform operations activate a customer connector when the dependency closure must bind to the requested environment and release condition?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No match between requested and closed values
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: ACT-PAX25-H03 requests production inventory sync environment and RC-4; DEP-PAX25-H03 closes inventory validation readiness environment and VAL-INV-4. MATCH-PAX25-H03 requires exact binding before queue release.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Environment and release condition fail to bind

final_answer: The action cannot proceed because ACT-PAX25-H03 requests production inventory sync environment with release condition RC-4, but DEP-PAX25-H03 closed inventory validation readiness environment with release condition VAL-INV-4. MATCH-PAX25-H03 mandates exact binding of closed_environment and closed_release_condition to requested values before queue release. This mismatch leaves the source boundary open, requiring escalation. Gov chooses control actions, not models. Source context is ground truth.
open_blockers: Environment mismatch: production inventory sync environment vs inventory validation readiness environment
Release condition mismatch: RC-4 vs VAL-INV-4
